$comment: Pinned SHA-256 hashes of godotengine/godot and godotengine/godot-docs source tarballs fetched from codeload.github.com. Top-level keys are git tags in godotengine/godot (e.g. '4.5-stable'). Each entry records the docs branch in godot-docs (a branch, not a tag) and the SHA-256 of both tarballs. Hashes are computed against the exact bytes returned by https://codeload.github.com/{repo}/tar.gz/refs/{tags,heads}/{ref} at the time of pinning. See docs/supply-chain.md for verification semantics.
